Series Prod/Dir: Neil Green; Exec Prod: John Hollywood; IMG. (Ep11/11)

programme.title: Dave Allen: In His Own Words
programme.desc: Dave Allen was one of the most influential comedians to appear on British TV, a brilliant storyteller whose sharp intelligence and mischievous irreverence changed TV comedy. But his humour often came under fire from all directions from the tabloids to the Church. He was even banned outright for what called harmless, naughty little sketches. This celebration of the comic features contributions from long-time collaborators Jacquie Clarke and Sabina Franklyn, alongside Jimmy Tarbuck, John Lloyd, Paul Jackson and comedians inspired by Dave's trailblazing voice - such as Stewart Lee and Adil Ray. This is a warm, funny and revealing celebration of a comic who made generations laugh - and taught us to look at the world differently. Exec Prod: Ned Parker/Danny Tipping; Dir: Colin Burgess; Longwave Studios
